name: part_007
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-pro-preview/part_007.webm

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco and Aki Rosenthal performing 'Kawaii Kanojo' on stage with neon decorations.
Scene transition to a bedroom set, then a performance of 'Chocolate Box' by Yuzuki Choco and Roboco-san.

subtitles.original: ぶつかり落ち合う 街の風は少し冷たい
subtitles.english: The wind in this city where we bump into each other is a little cold.

subtitles.original: 慣れないワイン無理やり飲み干してしまってはフラフラ
subtitles.english: Forcing myself to down wine I'm not used to, I get all dizzy.

subtitles.original: 嫌われちゃったらどうしよう
subtitles.english: What if you end up hating me?

subtitles.original: 下手に出ちゃったらどうしよう
subtitles.english: What if I act too humble?

subtitles.original: 少しは残したくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to leave even a little bit.

subtitles.original: ちょっと期待してね
subtitles.english: Keep your expectations up a little, okay?

subtitles.original: ずっと見栄張ってね
subtitles.english: Keep showing off for me, okay?

subtitles.original: 周りばかり気にして生きてる
subtitles.english: I live my life always worrying about those around me.

subtitles.original: ちょっと憂鬱かも
subtitles.english: It might be a little depressing.

subtitles.original: でもなんか寂しくて Ah
subtitles.english: But somehow it feels lonely, ah...

subtitles.original: 本当は自分じゃイキがって
subtitles.english: Actually, I'm just acting tough.

subtitles.original: いつも分かったフリして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to understand,

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに無理して
subtitles.english: forcing myself even though I'm not like that.

subtitles.original: 期待してないフリしても
subtitles.english: Even if I pretend I don't expect anything,

subtitles.original: やっぱ一番嬉しくて
subtitles.english: in the end, I'm the happiest.

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は
subtitles.english: Is the me who fixed herself up

subtitles.original: 可愛いかな
subtitles.english: cute to you?

subtitles.original: 今夜は壊れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Tonight, hold me tight enough to break me.

subtitles.original: 何もかも消えそうな
subtitles.english: Everything looks like it might vanish.

subtitles.original: 糸で繋がってる恋だね
subtitles.english: It's a love connected by a single thread.

subtitles.original: 私が諦めたらきっと
subtitles.english: If I were to give up, surely

subtitles.original: 簡単に消えちゃうね
subtitles.english: it would disappear so easily.

subtitles.original: 引き留めるにはどうする？
subtitles.english: What should I do to make you stay?

subtitles.original: あの娘だったらどうする？
subtitles.english: What would that girl do?

subtitles.original: 不器用な指
subtitles.english: Entwining these

subtitles.original: もっと絡めて
subtitles.english: clumsy fingers even more.

subtitles.original: いつもチェックしてね
subtitles.english: Check on me always, okay?

subtitles.original: 一喜一憂でね
subtitles.english: Get happy and sad over every little thing, okay?

subtitles.original: 他の娘と比べてばかりいた
subtitles.english: I was always comparing myself to other girls.

subtitles.original: 一番見て欲しい Ah
subtitles.english: I want you to look at me the most, ah...

subtitles.original: 目の前のあなたは Ah
subtitles.english: The you in front of me, ah...

subtitles.original: どこか違う景色見てる
subtitles.english: is looking at a scenery somewhere else.

subtitles.original: いつも優しいフリして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to be kind,

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに笑って
subtitles.english: laughing even though it's not like that.

subtitles.original: 近付けば近付くほど
subtitles.english: The closer I get to you,

subtitles.original: 心は遠く感じて
subtitles.english: the further my heart feels.

subtitles.original: 少しずつ離れてく
subtitles.english: I can tell

subtitles.original: こと分かるよ
subtitles.english: we're drifting apart little by little.

subtitles.original: 今夜は忘れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Tonight, hold me until I forget it all.

subtitles.original: 自分をもっと強く
subtitles.english: If only I could

subtitles.original: 持てればさよならを
subtitles.english: have a stronger sense of self,

subtitles.original: 言えるのにな
subtitles.english: I could say goodbye.

subtitles.original: いつも分かったフリして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to understand,

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに無理して
subtitles.english: forcing myself even though I'm not like that.

subtitles.original: ふと見せる優しさが
subtitles.english: That kindness you show suddenly,

subtitles.original: ずっと忘れられなくて
subtitles.english: I just can't forget it.

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は
subtitles.english: Is the me who fixed herself up

subtitles.original: 可愛いかな
subtitles.english: cute to you?

subtitles.original: 今夜は壊れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Tonight, hold me tight enough to break me.

subtitles.original: 突然溢れ出した
subtitles.english: Suddenly overflowing,

subtitles.original: 私頑張ったよね
subtitles.english: I did my best, didn't I?

subtitles.original: いつか振り向いてくれると
subtitles.english: Thinking you'd look my way someday,

subtitles.original: 思っていたのにな
subtitles.english: that's what I thought, but...

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私が
subtitles.english: The me who put up a front

subtitles.original: 剥がれていく
subtitles.english: is peeling away.

subtitles.original: 今夜は忘れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Tonight, hold me until I forget it all.

subtitles.original: なんかいつも眠そうだし
subtitles.english: You always look kinda sleepy.

subtitles.original: なんかいつもつまんなそうだし
subtitles.english: You always look kinda bored.

subtitles.original: なんかいつもヤバそうだし
subtitles.english: You always look kinda sketchy.

subtitles.original: なんかいつもスマホいじってるし
subtitles.english: You're always playing on your phone.

subtitles.original: 本当はテンション高いのに
subtitles.english: Even though you're actually high energy,

subtitles.original: アタシといると低いし
subtitles.english: it drops when you're with me.

subtitles.original: なんなの自分 ありえなくない？
subtitles.english: What is that? Isn't that unbelievable?

subtitles.original: 嫌い 大嫌い どうでもいい
subtitles.english: I hate you, I really hate you, whatever.

subtitles.original: だったらボクも言うけどさ
subtitles.english: Then I've got something to say too.

subtitles.original: ちっちゃいことですぐ怒るし
subtitles.english: You get mad at every little thing,

subtitles.original: 言い返したらすぐ泣くし
subtitles.english: and you cry as soon as I talk back.

subtitles.original: ごめんって言っても許してくれないし
subtitles.english: You don't forgive me even when I apologize.

subtitles.original: その割 機嫌が直れば
subtitles.english: But as soon as your mood improves,

subtitles.original: ケロっとおはようとか言うし
subtitles.english: you act like nothing happened and say 'Morning'.

subtitles.original: あぁなんて罪深い人なんだ
subtitles.english: Ah, what a sinful person you are.

subtitles.original: 畜生 もう知らないぞ
subtitles.english: Dammit, I don't care anymore!

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い 恋の魔法は
subtitles.english: The sweet, sweet magic of love...
